{{Quote|And stop kshhhing in my ear. You do that every morning, too. Just once I wish I could hear the bark of a dog, or the meow of a cat, instead of the kshhhhh of a mooka.|[[Ken]]|<ref name="The Lost City of the Jedi">''[[The Lost City of the Jedi]]''</ref>}}
'''Zeebo''' was the pet [[Mooka/Legends|Mooka]], a four-eared creature with both fur and feathers, belonging to the [[Adventures of a Jedi Prince|Jedi Prince]] [[Ken]] while he lived in the [[Lost City of the Jedi]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. He was very loving towards his owner, and was always wanting to be with him. He also woke Ken up early every single day, by licking his face or going "kshhh" in his ear, much to Ken's annoyance.

{{Char-stub}}
